Hedge Fund Equity Expertise Accessible To All–Tremblant's Global ETF
Brett Barakett's Tremblant Capital Launches Actively Managed ETF

holdings.infoBox: TOGA is an equity ETF with a total of 30 individual holdings. The top holdings are First American Treasury Obligations Fund Class X stock at 5.87%, Reddit at 5.71%, Spotify Technology at 4.98%, Live Nation Entertainment at 4.45%, and Grab Holdings at 4.41%.

overview.description: The Tremblant Global ETF (TOGA) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in total market equity. The fund is actively managed to hold a portfolio of globally listed equities. The fund uses a proprietary, fundamental process in selecting investments. TOGA was launched on Aug 1, 2022 and is issued by Tremblant.
